subject: Made something for The Wax Hut
body:
Hey,

I found The Wax Hut on Discogs and turned your inventory into a storefront where people can flip through crates like they would in your Ewing shop. I organized your diverse collection into browsable sections in a way that hopefully feels nicer than scrolling through Discogs.

I'm experimenting with this idea of a discovery layer for your store and would love your help testing it out. I'm in Philly and I'm always looking to check out new record shops. I haven't been to yours yet and would love to come chat about Milkcrate if you're interested.

Here's what it looks like:
https://milkcrate.fm/thewaxhut

Could be a nice thing to share with your customers or put on your social media.

Best,
Patrick
patrick@milkcrate.fm
